title: About ani-gui
intro: ani-gui is a desktop shell over ani-cli — Kitsu drives metadata, AniList feeds the home page's trending row, and aniskip marks OP/ED windows. Playback runs in the embedded hls.js player or hands off to an external one when you prefer.
donate_intro: If ani-gui has saved you time, a tip helps keep development going. Click the address to copy it, then paste into your wallet.
donate_copy_failed_toast: Couldn't access the clipboard — copy the address manually.
license_body: ani-gui is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. The full license text ships with each release.
